c.d: Total number of active users who regularly watch live streams on the platform
c.s: App analytics, platform statistics, third-party research reports

c.d: How easily users can access and start live streaming features within the app
c.s: User interface analysis, app store reviews, user experience testing

c.d: Number and quality of revenue generation methods available for live streamers
c.s: Platform documentation, creator program details, payment system analysis

c.d: Ability to stream simultaneously across multiple platforms or integrate with other services
c.s: Platform features, API documentation, third-party integration capabilities

c.d: Effectiveness of the platform's algorithm in promoting live content to relevant audiences
c.s: Platform performance metrics, creator feedback, engagement analytics
